title: Locator Mapping Type
description: Locates a variable's value(s) within a structured (hierarchical) dataset such as XML or JSON, via a locator expression (e.g., XPath or JSONPath). DDI-CDI LocatorMapping. Used in place of column-index/text mappings for cdi:StructuredDataSet distributions.

@type.description: A cdifLocatorMapping instance must be typed cdif:LocatorMapping (not cdif:PhysicalMapping).

cdi:locator.description: Expression locating the variable's value(s) in the structured document (XPath, JSONPath, pointer, etc.). LocatorMapping.locator.
